pillars.name: USAAIO Camp / Gold Medal
pillars.description: The single highest-leverage competition credential. Gold or Camp selection is the signal frontier labs recognize immediately.

pillars.name: Codeforces International Master
pillars.description: Top 1-2% of all competitive programmers globally. Combined with USAAIO Camp, this profile is essentially unprecedented at 18.

pillars.name: Published Research with Henstock
pillars.description: The artifact that makes Reid discoverable before any hiring conversation starts. A preprint or paper transforms Reid from impressive applicant to genuine research peer.

pillars.name: Public Visibility
pillars.description: Labs find candidates. Candidates don't find labs. Reid needs to be findable by the right people before any formal application.

milestones.label: Known by name inside at least one frontier lab

accomplishments.title: Game Development — 5 Unity Games
accomplishments.description: Developed 5 interactive games in Unity using C#. Explored OOP, physics engines, real-time interactivity, and gameplay mechanics.

accomplishments.title: Selected for Honors Math Analysis & AP Physics
accomplishments.description: Selected as 1 of 14 students for both Honors Math Analysis and AP Physics as a freshman.

accomplishments.title: Johns Hopkins CTY — Data Structures & Algorithms
accomplishments.description: Completed Data Structures & Algorithms through Johns Hopkins Center for Talented Youth.

accomplishments.title: AI Stock Trading System
accomplishments.description: Designed AI-powered trading system using ensemble models (Random Forest + XGBoost) with real-time sentiment analysis from financial news via GPT-4. Optimized trading thresholds using gradient descent; visualized backtest results with equity curves.

accomplishments.title: AP Physics — Score 5
accomplishments.description: Perfect score on AP Physics. Selected as 1 of 14 students for the course as a freshman.

accomplishments.title: Software Engineering Intern — Accelerado.ai
accomplishments.description: Built NLP pipeline using Whisper (ASR) + GPT-4 API to classify call quality and predict conversion likelihood. Integrated voice analytics for real-time tracking of thousands of client calls daily.

accomplishments.title: UCF Competitive Programming Summer Institute — Silver Medal
accomplishments.description: 2nd Place individually in the final competition. Competed against students entering 11th, 12th grade, and first-year college.

accomplishments.title: Harvard Extension CSCI E-82 — A-, Distinguished Performance
accomplishments.description: Completed graduate-level Advanced Machine Learning, Data Mining & AI. Instructor: Professor Peter V. Henstock. Grade: A-, Distinguished Performance Recognition. Competed against Master's and PhD students.

accomplishments.title: WiFi Demand Forecasting — Cisco Collaboration
accomplishments.description: Co-developed time-series forecasting system with Cisco industry collaborator. ~10 years of WiFi sales data. Predicted WiFi 6/6E/7 demand 6 months ahead. Hybrid SARIMA + Random Forest with Bayesian optimization (Optuna). ~92% accuracy, MAPE ~8%.

accomplishments.title: NBA Player Analytics — PCA, t-SNE, UMAP
accomplishments.description: Applied PCA, MDS, t-SNE, and UMAP to NBA player performance data to uncover role-based patterns. Compared interpretability and clustering quality across dimensionality reduction techniques.

accomplishments.title: Codeforces Expert — Rating 1618, Top 6% Globally
accomplishments.description: Reached Expert through consistent performance in international mixed-age competitive programming contests. Notable: Div 2 Round 1052 — Rank 942/50,000 (Top 1.9% globally).

accomplishments.title: LeetCode Max Rating 1917 — Top 3.9% Globally
accomplishments.description: Recognized for high performance in algorithmic coding challenges emphasizing efficiency, data structures, and dynamic programming.

accomplishments.title: Kaggle ML Competition — 3rd Place (Harvard Extension)
accomplishments.description: 3rd out of 25 teams in graduate-level ML competition. Built XGBoost + CNN ensemble. Competed against Master's and PhD students while in 10th grade.

accomplishments.title: PSAT Math — 760/760 (Perfect Score)
accomplishments.description: Perfect score on PSAT Math section.

accomplishments.title: Deep Embedded Clustering Research Extension
accomplishments.description: Extended DEC framework; compared DEC vs. DCSS vs. R-DEC. Evaluated with normalized mutual information and reconstruction loss. Explored latent space optimization and feature disentanglement.

accomplishments.title: Density-Based Clustering for Geospatial Analysis
accomplishments.description: K-Means, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN for urban crime hotspot detection. PAI@5% = 16.23%. 10-minute recorded research presentation (Oct 21, 2025).

accomplishments.title: Neural Network from Scratch — 94% Accuracy
accomplishments.description: Implemented full forward/backpropagation using only NumPy. No deep learning libraries. 94% test accuracy. Demonstrates strong conceptual understanding of neural network mathematics.

accomplishments.title: MyClassPal.ai — Founder & Lead Developer
accomplishments.description: AI-driven study planning platform with Canvas LMS integration, adaptive planning, AI tutoring, mastery mode, confidence-accuracy matrix, AP Exam Mode, and responsible AI guardrails. Submitted to Presidential AI Challenge (Track II).

accomplishments.title: ArgueMaster.com — AI Debate Coach
accomplishments.description: Built real-time AI debate coach using ChatGPT API and ElevenLabs voice synthesis. 10+ persona styles, adjustable difficulty, multi-agent LLM orchestration for counterargument generation and real-time scoring.

accomplishments.title: CALICO — Silver Medal, Top 10.7% (117/1,092 teams)
accomplishments.description: UC Berkeley open informatics competition. Mixed-age field including collegiate and adult competitors. Solved 9 timed ICPC-style algorithmic problems.

accomplishments.title: UCF Division 1 Programming Contest — 8th Place
accomplishments.description: 8th of ~90 participants in top competitive division. Solved 7 university-level algorithmic problems. Top 10% as a 10th grader.

accomplishments.title: USAAIO 2026 — Honor Roll, Round 2 Qualifier
accomplishments.description: Score 107 (national cutoff: 98). Qualified for Round 2 at MIT (April 4-5, 2026). Demonstrated strength in AI theory, ML, probabilistic modeling, and algorithmic reasoning.

accomplishments.title: Research Collaboration — Professor Peter V. Henstock
accomplishments.description: Active research collaboration with Prof. Henstock (Incyte ML Group Leader, Harvard Lecturer, former Pfizer ML/AI Lead, PhD in AI). Two projects: (1) spatio-temporal clustering for clinical trials, (2) GNN/knowledge graph on clinical trials database.

currentFocus: Summer: Henstock research + CF contests + SAT English + transformer self-study
Junior year: Proof-based Linear Algebra (replacing Spanish)
GitHub audit and personal site launch

mentors.name: Professor Peter V. Henstock
mentors.context: Incyte ML Group Leader; Harvard Lecturer (14+ years); former Pfizer ML/AI Lead; PhD in AI; top 5 pharma AI leader in US. Also taught Reid's Harvard E-82 course.

mentors.name: Scott Brazina
mentors.context: MIT alum with strong recommendation track record. Key network connector.
